chunks.title: Call to the Nations for Judgment
chunks.reason: Yahweh summons the coastlands and nations to a divine courtroom contest.

chunks.title: Promise of Strength to Israel
chunks.reason: A direct address to Jacob offering comfort and a promise of victory.

chunks.title: Promise of Provision for the Needy
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares He will provide water and trees in the wilderness.

chunks.title: Challenge to the Idols
chunks.reason: Yahweh challenges false gods to predict the future and declares their failure.
